name: @stevie/agents
description: Stevie Social — Cloudflare Workers monorepo for queue consumers, cron triggers, durable objects, agents, and MCP servers. Replaces backend Celery + Redis. See ../docs/core/agents-migration.md for the migration plan.

scripts.dev: echo 'Run pnpm dev inside a specific worker dir, e.g. cd workers/stripe-sync && pnpm dev'
